title: Essentials 3D Pen Set for Kids, Easy to Use, Learn from Home Art Activity Set, Educational STEM Toy for Boys & Girls Ages 6+
features: CHILD-SAFE 3D PEN - Designed with no hot parts, completely safe for kids aged 6+. Pen nozzle and plastic can be touched with no burn risks. Uses only the safest 3Doodler Start plastic filaments.
STEM LEARNING AT HOME - As a tactile learning toy, the pen inspires creativity, design, planning, building and spatial understanding.
PLASTIC MADE IN THE USA - The 3Doodler Start uses a proprietary child-friendly PCL plastic made at our production facility in Ohio.
MORE START PLASTICS, TEMPLATES & STENCILS - Visit the official 3Doodler website to get additional plastic filaments and downloadable stencils and templates.

THE COMPLETE 3D PEN KIT FOR KIDS - Each box includes 3Doodler Start 3D Pen, DoodlePad, Doodlemat, 2 Mixed-color Packs of Start plastics (48 Strands), Micro-USB Charger & Activity Guide + a ton of creative potential. Comes in a certified & sustainable brown packaging!
description: Product Description Tactile Tech That Boosts Kids' Creative Confidence Whether your child is into Arts & Crafts, Science, and Math, or building and tinkering, we have projects that will capture their attention & get them creating! The Complete Package The complete package. This 3Doodler Start+ 3D Pen comes packed with different colors of 3Doodler Start+ plastics & a comprehensive project booklet. Colorful Filaments The 3Doodler Start Plastics have all been subjected to the strictest standards of safety testing, making it the only child-safe 3D pen for kids. Projects Included Enjoy doodling for hours with this 3Doodler Start+ booklet. Includes a wide variety of fun creatives project templates for the whole family! Possibilities Are Limitless Use the Activity Guide or hundreds of free stencils and tutorials on our website to make your own glasses, helicopters, masks and more. Fun Learning At Home The 3Doodler Start+ can help encourage creative endeavors and keep your child entertained at home for hours! As a tactile learning toy, the 3Doodler Start+ inspires creativity, design, planning, building, and spatial understanding. Makes STEM Education Relevant The 3Doodler Start+ combines art and design with technology in a fun and creative way. Its easy-to-use, uncomplicated technology drives engagement and comprehension of critical STEM subjects. Safe to Use The Only Child-Safe 3D Pen. Designed with no external hot parts and using only the safest & quality Start plastics. The 3Doodler Start filament is warm when extruded and is safe to touch and the pen tip doesn't get hot, you can safely use your hands to shape your doodles to perfection. The 3Doodler Start+ FAQs How does 3Doodler Start+ work? The 3Doodler Start+ plastic extrudes from the nozzle. It will harden in a few seconds, giving you time to shape your Doodles to perfection. One single click is all it takes to get your 3Doodler Start feeding. When you need to stop, one click is all it takes to stop the flow of plastic. Double click to reverse the strand. What can we make? Need inspiration? Get free downloadable stencils and templates! It takes time to master a 3Doodler pen, but don’t let this stop you! Think outside the box and let your imagination take off. You'll be surprised by how quickly your 3Doodling skills evolve. Which filaments can be used? The 3Doodler Start+ 3D Pen is only compatible with the 3Doodler Start plastic filaments which is 2.5mm in diameter. Need to get in touch with us? Our support team is here to ensure you’re Doodling as soon as possible. We have an easy step-by-step troubleshooting guide too! Alternatively, 3Doodler team is always ready to help. 3Doodler Start+ 3D Printing Pen 3Doodler Start+ Plastic Refills 3Doodler Create+ 3D Printing Pen 3Doodler Create+ Plastic Refills Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 8,916 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,012 4.0 out of 5 stars 149 3.7 out of 5 stars 97 Price £39.99 £ 39 . 99 — no data — no data £32.99 £ 32 . 99 Ages 6+ Yes Yes No No Ages 14+ No No Yes Yes Use with 3Doodler Start Refills Yes no data No no data Use with 3Doodler Create+ Refills No no data Yes no data Use with 3Doodler PRO+ Refills No no data Yes no data
